---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for the native macOS browser
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Security Check

If this request includes vulnerability details or exploit behavior, use the private reporting process in [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) instead of opening a public issue.

## User Workflow

What are you trying to do in Quartz, and where does the current experience fall short?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Why It Belongs In Quartz

Explain how this fits a native macOS WebKit browser rather than an extension, script, or external tool.

## Alternatives Considered

List any workarounds or different designs you considered.

## Visuals Or References

Add screenshots, mockups, links, or examples from other macOS apps if useful.
